WebLink.description: This button takes you to a report equivalent of the Google Tracker for rental units.
WebLink.url: https://cgph.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Report/00Oo0000005Gp54EAC/view ?fv0=Property Questionnaire &fv1={!HOMEtracker__Property__c.CampaignId__c} &fv2=Full Online Application Submitted,Pending,Unit No Longer Available,Invited to Submit a Full Application
